creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Converting special float values to int produces garbage results instead of errors.

**Repro:**
```
print(int(1.0/0))   // 9223372036854775807 (should error)
print(int(-1.0/0))  // -9223372036854775808 (should error)
print(int(0.0/0))   // 0 (NaN -> 0, should error)
```

**Test files:** `bugs/operators/113_int_special_floats.rad`, `113b_int_nan.rad`
title: int() silently converts Inf/NaN to garbage integer values
